summary: Phase 3 + 4 testing complete for LeadNation. Backend: 60/60 pytest cases pass (28 Phase 1+2 regression + 32 new Phase 3+4). Frontend: All 16 new pages render correctly. All key data-testids found and integrations to new APIs verified end-to-end (HSN finder, Landed Cost, Find Buyers, Export Readiness 3-step with lead capture, AI Assistant with MOCKED badge, Products/Corridors/HSN/Industries/Blog detail pages, Suppliers/Marketplace/Network). Mega-nav (Explore/Platform/Learn dropdowns), floating WhatsApp, Create Account + Download App CTAs all present. Sitemap.xml contains all new routes.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py has grown to ~1200+ lines — strongly recommend splitting into routers (tools.py, products.py, corridors.py, hsn.py, industries.py, blog.py, marketplace.py, ai.py) before next phase. Already flagged in Phase 2.

All Phase 3+4 data (HSN_DB, PRODUCTS_DB, CORRIDOR_DB, INDUSTRY_DB, BLOG_DB, SAMPLE_BUYERS/SUPPLIERS, AI_RESPONSES) is MOCKED in-memory as expected for this phase — fine for MVP, but should be moved to MongoDB collections for production.
/api/ai-ask uses keyword-substring matching — note that 'document' inside 'documentation' would still match. Acceptable for mock. isMock:true is returned so UI correctly shows MOCKED badge.

Mixed 404 strategy: some endpoints use JSONResponse(status_code=404) (product/corridor/hsn/industry/country) while standard FastAPI default uses HTTPException — consider unifying. Functionally works, tests pass.

Landed-cost calculator UI auto-prefills default values (10000/800/120/600/350) which override on first render — confirm intentional; otherwise users may submit demo data accidentally. Math is correct (shares sum to ~100%, total matches sum).
test_credentials: N/A — no auth required for Phase 3+4 endpoints
seed_data_creation: Created test leads via /api/export-readiness (TEST_ER, test_er@example.com) and /api/leads (TEST_LeadNation User) during regression run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1+2+3+4 all green (60/60 backend, full frontend coverage of new pages, sitemap, mega-nav). Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/test_leadnation_api.py with TestHsnFinder, TestLandedCost, TestExportIncentive, TestProductResearch, TestFindBuyers, TestExportReadiness, TestAiAsk, TestProductsCatalog, TestCorridors, TestHsn, TestIndustries, TestBlog, TestSuppliers, TestMarketplace, TestNetwork, TestSitemap classes added. All Phase 3+4 data intentionally MOCKED. /sitemap.xml returns 200 via preview ingress and includes /tools, /ai-assistant, /products, /corridors, /hsn/, /industries, /blog, /suppliers, /marketplace, /network.
rca of the issue: No issues found. HSN Finder correctly matches 'rice' to Basmati Rice with matchScore. Landed Cost math verified (total = sum, shares sum to ~100). Export Readiness all-true returns score=100 / band='Export-ready'; all-false returns 0; with email, leadCaptured=true (verified in DB insertion path). AI Assistant returns Commercial Invoice/Packing List for 'documents' question with isMock=true. Products/Corridors/HSN/Industries/Blog detail pages all show expected content with correct data-testid attributes. Suppliers list returns lockedExtras=true and supports q/country/category filters. Marketplace returns exactly 6 listings, 4 reels, 3 buyer requests. Network returns 6 members + 4 stats. Sitemap covers every new route.
